title: hohenbergia augusta
intro: Hohenbergia augusta, also known as the pinecone bromeliad, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its distinctive pinecone-like inflorescence. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of Hohenbergia augusta, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to support immune function and reduce inflammation, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine.
